message.content:
@startuml
participant "File" as File
participant "LexicalAnalysisDriver\n" as LexicalAnalysisDriver
participant "LexicalAnalysisJava\n" as LexicalAnalysisJava
participant "JavaSyntaxLib\n" as JavaSyntaxLib
participant TypeCheck #90EEF5 
participant ColorCode 	#FFB6C1  
participant ErrorCheck   #D3D3D3 

activate File
    activate LexicalAnalysisDriver
    
        note right of File : invokes
        
            activate LexicalAnalysisJava
            
                note left of LexicalAnalysisJava:Calls
                
                    activate JavaSyntaxLib
                    
                        deactivate JavaSyntaxLib
                        
                            note left of LexicalAnalysisJava: Calls
                            
                                activate TypeCheck
                                
                                    note left of TypeCheck: SyntaxTypeCheck()
                                    
                                        return Return(TypeCheck)
                                        
                                            deactivate TypeCheck
                                            
                                                activate ColorCode
                                                
                                                    note left of ColorCode: SyntaxColorCheck()
                                                    
                                                        return Return(ColorCode)
                                                        
                                                            deactivate ColorCode
                                                            
                                                                activate ErrorCheck
                                                                    
                                                                    note left of ErrorCheck: SyntaxErrorCheck()
                                                                        
                                                                        alt [successful case]
                                                                            return Error Free
                                                                         else[Error Case]   
                                                                             return Return Error Message     
                                                                          endalt
                                                                          


@enduml
